query:
SELECT
                d.id as document_id,
                d.name as document_name,
                d."fileType" as file_type,
                d.owner as owner,
                d."updatedAt"::timestamptz as "updated_at",
                (dt.document_id IS NOT NULL) as "is_task!"
            FROM "Document" d
            LEFT JOIN document_task dt ON dt.document_id = d.id
            WHERE
                d."id" = ANY($1)
